channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Supreme Court restores access to abortion pill mifepristone through telehealth, mail and pharmacies
item.description: The Supreme Court has restored broad access to the abortion pill mifepristone, blocking a ruling that had threatened to upend one of the main ways abortion is provided across the nation.

item.title: Police search for suspects in Oklahoma shooting that sent at least 18 people to hospitals
Rudy Giuliani is breathing on his own while hospitalized with pneumonia, spokesperson says
